content.inputFormat: The first line of an input contains single integer **N** — the number of vertices in the graph. Vertices are numerated from **1** to **N**. Next **N** lines contain **N** characters each — adjacency matrix of the graph. If there is '1' in **jth** character of the **ith** line then there is an edge from vertex **i** to vertex **j** in Andrii's graph. It's guaranteed that given graph does not contain cycles.
